svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="版本号治理三代演进" id="flytimeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-510" dy="-114" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="版本号治理:从接龙到时间戳,撞了三代才稳" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="480" x="280" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="G1 接龙制
V1 → V2 → V3
4 人各开分支都觉得自己是下一个
第一周就撞号" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="G2 号段制
甲 1000-1999 · 乙 2000-2999
resolve_flyway_segment.py 算号
gap 用完尴尬 · AI 不会预约" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="395" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="G3 时间戳(当前)
V20260614141405__desc.sql
秒级唯一 · touch 命令生成
构建期兜底校验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="730" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="真实例子
V1000 / V2014 / V2015
(号段制残留,目录里还在)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="150" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="真实例子
V202400001 / V202401001
(10 位时间戳,现役主力)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="650" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lesson" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="教训:治理方案别一上来追求完美,先跑起来,撞了再改
三代演进留下历史痕迹,两套版本号并存不影响 Flyway(按数值排序)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="200" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="核心原则:凡是能机器校验的,绝不依赖人
版本号唯一 → 构建期脚本 · 漏执行 → 启动期校验 · tenant_id → review checklist" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="680" x="180" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea" edge="1" parent="1" source="g1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="g2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb" edge="1" parent="1" source="g2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="g3" /> <mxCell id="ec" edge="1" parent="1" source="g2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;endArrow=none;dashed=1;" target="ex1" /> <mxCell id="ed" edge="1" parent="1" source="g3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;endArrow=none;dashed=1;" target="ex2" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
